case_title: MUNDIS, SOPHIA P., EXECUTOR OF vs. WALKER, NATASHA et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUNDIS, SOPHIA P., EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF PETER V. LISIUKOFF, DECEDENT

JUDGE CHAITIN, CSAUCEDA-REPORTER, JWILLIS-MCGHEE, CLERK C/C FOR JURY TRIAL; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; ROBERT DE SMET ATTY FOR PLTF; DEFT NATASHA WALKER IN PRO PER; CASE SETTLED TERMS OF SETTLEMENT READ INTO RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF SHALL RE- COVER FROM DEFT THE SUM OF $1120. RENTS/DAMAGES & COSTS IN THE AMT OF $270; RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1460 YORK LOWER UNIT, SF, CA; DEFT SHALL DELIVER KEYS TO REAL ESTATE AGENT; PLTF HAS AGREED TO PAY RELOCATION COSTS OF THE DEFT UP TO $2000, ANY FUNDS REMAINING DEFT IS ENTITLED TO; THAT AMOUNT WILL BE DEDUCTED FROM ANY AWARD FRM PROBATE CASE THAT IS NOW PENDING IN THE SUPERIOR COURT OF SF PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
